top_items.title: Introducing Veo 3.1 Lite and a new Veo upscaling capability on Vertex AI
top_items.one_liner: Announces Veo 3.1 Lite and an upscaling capability on Vertex AI for cost-effective video generation and enhancement.

top_items.title: Claude Code Is No Longer a Coding Assistant
top_items.one_liner: Describes how Claude Code has shifted from a coding tool to a platform enabling the management of AI workers.

top_items.title: The TL;DR of Claude Code Inside Obsidian
top_items.one_liner: Explores the integration and utility of Claude Code within the Obsidian note-taking and knowledge management application.
